content:
About Kim Trade Services

Kim Trade Services is a licensed customs brokerage in Columbus, Ohio, founded in 2008. We handle classification, entry filing, USMCA analysis, and compliance for importers across the Midwest. This blog is where I write up the tariff and trade developments that actually matter to the people we work with.

I am Jason Kim, Founder and Managing Principal. Licensed customs broker, certified trade specialist, and the person who answers the phone when a container gets held.
title: About

content:
Services

Tariff classification reviews, USMCA rule of origin analysis, duty drawback claim filing, ISF and customs entry filing, trade compliance audits, and monthly compliance retainers. If it involves goods crossing the border and a duty bill, we do it.
title: Services

content:
Contact

Kim Trade Services is based in the Columbus business district. To talk through a classification question, a held shipment, or a compliance review, reach the office and we will route you to the right person. We work with importers across Ohio and the Great Lakes region.
title: Contact

content:
Mentorship

The Columbus Trade Mentorship Program is a free program I co-run with Ryan Montoya for people starting out in customs and trade compliance. We meet regularly, work real classification and origin problems, and help newer brokers build the judgment the exam does not teach. No cost, no catch.
title: Mentorship

content:
Privacy Policy

Kim Trade Services collects only the information you provide when you contact us or subscribe to this blog. We do not sell your information. Comments you leave are stored with the email address you submit so we can reply. For questions about your data, contact the office.
title: Privacy

content:
Subscribe

This blog updates about twice a quarter with whatever tariff or compliance issue is most likely to affect importers. If you want an email when a new post goes up, enter your address and we will add you to the list. We send the posts and nothing else.
title: Subscribe
